summary: Hidden-by-default source evidence container for learners who need more detail without crowding the lesson.
renderingRules: Render as a collapsed drawer or reveal panel, not as a default visible lesson block.
Keep citations compact and secondary to the authored learning flow.
Allow source blocks to use cards, tables, or continuation notes when helpful.
interactionRules: Learners may open and close the drawer on demand.
Opening source support must not reset study progress.
persistenceRules: Drawer open state may be ephemeral; source content itself does not require persistence.
constraints: Do not place source support ahead of the authored lesson.
Do not let the source drawer dominate the visible section layout.
